results.title: Cal.com API v2
results.description: Cal.com API v2 provides endpoints for managing bookings, users, organizations, and webhooks for the Cal.com scheduling platform.

results.title: Cal.com API
results.description: The Cal.com API provides programmatic access to manage scheduling functionalities, including attendees, bookings, availabilities, event types, and more, with API key authentication.

results.title: Booking.com APIs
results.description: Booking.com offers a suite of APIs, including Demand API, Connectivity APIs, Metasearch Connect API, and Data Portability API, enabling developers to integrate travel experiences, manage properties, and access user data.

results.title: Gecko Booking API
results.description: Gecko Booking API is a comprehensive REST API for managing bookings, customers, cash registers, vouchers, events, and documents for booking and scheduling systems.

results.title: Pull API
results.description: The Pull API provides endpoints to retrieve direct booking information, availability, pricing, and restrictions for accommodations.

results.title: Cal.com
results.description: Cal.com is the open-source Calendly successor, offering self-hosted or hosted scheduling infrastructure with full control over data, workflow, and appearance.

results.title: NeetoCal API
results.description: NeetoCal API provides endpoints for managing scheduling links, bookings, availabilities, slots, packages, team members, and discount codes.

results.title: Go Distributor Reservation APIs
results.description: This documentation details the Go Distributor Reservation APIs, which enable distributors to manage the real-time booking flow, including checking availability, pre-booking, booking, modifying, canceling, and querying reservations with hotel suppliers.

results.title: Cloudbeds API
results.description: The Cloudbeds API provides programmatic access to Cloudbeds' hospitality management platform, enabling developers to integrate and manage various aspects such as authentication, bookings, guest information, and property settings.

results.title: QloApps
results.description: QloApps is an open-source hotel reservation system that allows hotels to manage bookings and provide a seamless online booking experience for guests.

results.title: Boulevard Client API
results.description: The Boulevard Client API enables developers to build customized customer-facing booking experiences, facilitating appointment bookings, membership/gift card purchases, and client information retrieval.

results.title: IT-Tour API
results.description: IT-Tour API provides methods for searching, booking, and managing standard and excursion tours, including functionalities for hotel information, payments, and various reference data.

results.title: PriceLabs
results.description: PriceLabs is a dynamic pricing and analytics solution for vacation rentals, providing tools for setting optimal prices, managing listings, and integrating with booking platforms like Airbnb, Booking.com, and Vrbo.

results.title: Beds24 API
results.description: The Beds24 API provides programmatic access to manage bookings, availabilities, property details, rates, and invoices for Beds24 accounts, supporting JSON, XML, and CSV data exchange.

results.title: PKFARE Flight Buyer API
results.description: The PKFARE Flight Buyer API provides comprehensive functionalities for air ticket booking, ancillaries, refunds, changes, and flight schedule management.

results.title: Bókun
results.description: Bókun is a booking and management platform for tours and activities, offering an API for external integrations.

results.title: Guesty Booking Engine API
results.description: The Guesty Booking Engine API provides developers with step-by-step instructions and documentation to quickly integrate with the Guesty Booking Engine for managing listings, reservations, and quotes.

results.title: Autocomplete API
results.description: The Aviation Edge Autocomplete API returns relevant airport and city suggestions based on user-submitted letters, ideal for travel booking platforms to display choices for departure or arrival locations.

results.title: Channex.io
results.description: Channex.io provides APIs for managing hotel properties, room types, rates, availability, and bookings, facilitating integrations with OTAs, booking engines, and channel managers.

results.title: You.com Search API
results.description: The You.com Search API provides LLM-ready web results and news based on user queries, ideal for integrating search capabilities into AI applications.

results.title: Booking.com Connectivity Developer Portal
results.description: The Connectivity Developer Portal provides APIs and solutions for partners to integrate with Booking.com, covering property management, reservations, payments, and guest experience enhancements.

results.title: Duffel
results.description: Duffel provides APIs for developers to build travel agency functionalities, enabling them to connect to flights, stays, and manage bookings, cancellations, and other travel-related services.

results.title: Cal.com Cal Provider
results.description: Cal Provider is a component used to set up scheduling capabilities within React or Next.js applications, integrated at the root of the app to manage user access and configuration.

results.title: Yclients API Python
results.description: A Python wrapper for the YClients API, utilizing ujson and httpx for faster performance, enabling interaction with YClients for booking and data retrieval.

results.title: Kalix API
results.description: The Kalix API provides programmatic access to manage appointments, clients, bills, clinicians, online scheduling, and webhooks for the Kalix health platform.

results.title: Juniper API
results.description: The Juniper WebService is an API designed to facilitate seamless integration between third-party systems and the Juniper Booking Engine, enabling automated booking operations and administrative tasks.

results.title: Calendly API
results.description: Calendly's API allows developers to integrate Calendly's scheduling functionality into their own applications, offering features like direct scheduling and custom portals.

results.title: Channex.io
results.description: Channex.io provides comprehensive API documentation for managing properties, channels, bookings, and more, facilitating seamless integration for hospitality businesses.

results.title: liteAPI
results.description: liteAPI is an efficient API providing seamless access to a wide range of hotel data, including availability, rates, and booking options, designed for building travel and hospitality applications and monetizing accommodations at over 2 million properties worldwide.

results.title: Hospedin API
results.description: Hospedin API provides a comprehensive set of endpoints for managing property management system operations including bookings, reservations, guest information, transactions, and various other hospitality-related data.
